     the Fermi energy is     0.4276 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.49351464 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04990028 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -115127.15962991 Ry
